arts.ttl: Real Valladolid prepared to cash in on exciting 21-year-old winger in January
arts.sum: Real Valladolid have had a difficult first season back in La Liga, as they currently sit in 19th place in the standings having played 13 matches (two more than Valencia, who are only two points behind them). However, they have unearthed a gem in the last three months, and that is Raul Moro.
